title: SocialBench
description: Return the task answer or reply for each SocialBench item covering role-play sociality, memory, self-awareness, and group preference judgments.
baseline_summary: A placeholder social role-play solver that picks the first choice when present and otherwise returns an empty string.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher average SocialBench score is better across role-play sociality items.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the best answer or reply for the current SocialBench item.
